name: Exploration only — no combat trigger
description: Negative check: rich narration without starting combat. expect.combatTriggered false each step. Catches accidental combat initiation from peaceful RP. sessionId 25.

steps.message: We crest the hill at dusk—the valley below is a quilt of fields and smoke from distant hearths. I take a slow breath.
I describe what Silas remembers about this region from old maps—rivers, trade roads, anything useful for the party.
I ask Mira quietly if she sees anything odd on the road ahead—tracks, camps, anything.
